arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford leaves Manchester United as Aston Villa complete ambitious loan move
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has officially departed Manchester United to join Aston Villa on-loan. The 27-year-old burst onto the scene at Old Trafford in 2016, scoring twice in consecutive...

arts.ttl: Aston Villa sign Rashford on loan from Man Utd
arts.sum: Manchester United forward Marcus Rashford has joined Aston Villa on loan for the remainder of the season. Rashford has made 15 Premier League appearances for Man Utd this season, scoring in head coach Ruben Amorim ’s first match - a 1-1 draw at Ipswich Town on 24 November - before adding two more in a 4-0 win over Everton a week later.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford breaks silence on Aston Villa transfer and sends farewell wish to Man Utd
arts.sum: Manchester United and England forward Marcus Rashford will spend the rest of the season at Aston Villa, with both clubs and the player confirming the move on Sunday

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford joins Aston Villa on loan from Manchester United
arts.sum: Rashford will spend the rest of the season with Villa.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford joins Aston Villa on loan as Manchester United strike deal on wage demands
arts.sum: Aston Villa have agreed to cover the majority of the 27-year-old’s wages until the end of the season

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford sends message to Manchester United with first words as Aston Villa player
arts.sum: The forward has explained why he has joined the Villans

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford: Aston Villa officially complete signing of Man Utd star
arts.sum: In December, Rashford announced his intention to leave his boyhood club Man Utd after being omitted from the Manchester Derby squad by head coach Ruben Amorim. Aston Villa have announced the signing of Manchester United winger Marcus Rashford .

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford ends Manchester United nightmare as Aston Villa confirm loan transfer
arts.sum: England forward had been frozen out by Ruben Amorim

arts.ttl: Aston Villa sign Marcus Rashford: Wage details, purchase option included, possible debut date
arts.sum: Aston Villa complete the loan signing of Marcus Rashford from Manchester United, with the forward moving to Villa Park for the second half of the 2024-25 campaign.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford completes loan move to Aston Villa and seals Man United exit - with buy option included in his deal after Ruben Amorim exile
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has completed his loan move to Aston Villa and sealed his exit from Manchester United after falling out favour under Ruben Amorim.
